task_description: Add a rich INTELLIGENCE status panel to the EA dashboard showing Python-side v9.2 intelligence state: regime, ATR filter, tick flow consistency, signal persistence, strategy mode, and overall decision with color coding. Python writes intelligence to a shared file, EA reads and displays it.

verification.summary: 111 tests pass (107 original + 4 new intelligence tests). 5 pre-existing failures in test_tick_collector.py unchanged. MQL5 code cannot be compiled (no MetaEditor) but follows existing patterns exactly. New tests exercise write_intelligence() method end-to-end: file creation, format validation (10 pipe-delimited fields), overwrite behavior, and specific field values.
